text: & Container Key Concepts O mastiemcanin @ s * Dockerfiles are used to build images * Portable - self-contained, always run as expected e Lightweight - Parent OS used, fs layers are shared * Container only runs the application & environment it needs * Provides much of the isolation VM's do * Ports are ‘exposed’ to the host and beyond... e Application stacks can be multi-container ...
